comment.base: The oath for Mayor of New York City is supposed to affirm loyalty to the U.S. Constitution and the Constitution of the State of New York. If that oath was not taken properly, then it calls the legitimacy of the office into question. This isn’t about personal belief—it’s about upholding the laws of the United States. An oath that doesn’t meet constitutional standards isn’t symbolic; it matters. Without a valid oath, the authority of the position itself is undermined. What a joke

comment.base: The left and Islam are indirect agents of influence for England and France. All international organizations are under the authority of England and France. For example, the veto power is in the hands of France, England, China, Russia, Germany, and the American Democrats. These countries may appear separate, but through the infiltrated leftists of Britain and France, they are actually one. They try to prevent the right from gaining power by using assassination or labeling. Look at how England and France, through these very international organizations, protect and safeguard the terrorist regime of Iran. England and France, through the left and Islam, impose colonialism and influence over the world. And all international organizations are under the dominance of Britain and France.
